test_cases.name: health_check_success
test_cases.description: Health check endpoint returns 200 with status ok

test_cases.name: create_author_with_all_fields
test_cases.description: Create author with name, bio, and born_year returns 201

test_cases.name: create_author_missing_name
test_cases.description: Create author without required name field returns 422

test_cases.name: create_author_invalid_born_year
test_cases.description: Create author with born_year > 2026 returns 422

test_cases.name: get_author_success
test_cases.description: Get existing author returns 200 with ETag header

test_cases.name: get_author_not_found
test_cases.description: Get non-existent author returns 404

test_cases.name: get_author_with_etag_match
test_cases.description: Get author with matching If-None-Match header returns 304

test_cases.name: update_author_success
test_cases.description: Update author with valid data returns 200

test_cases.name: update_author_etag_mismatch
test_cases.description: Update author with mismatched If-Match header returns 412

test_cases.name: delete_author_success
test_cases.description: Delete author without associated books returns 204

test_cases.name: delete_author_with_books
test_cases.description: Delete author with associated books returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_category_success
test_cases.description: Create category with unique name returns 201

test_cases.name: create_category_duplicate_name
test_cases.description: Create category with duplicate name returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_book_success
test_cases.description: Create book with all required fields returns 201

test_cases.name: create_book_invalid_isbn_length
test_cases.description: Create book with ISBN < 10 characters returns 422

test_cases.name: create_book_duplicate_isbn
test_cases.description: Create book with duplicate ISBN returns 409 Conflict

test_cases.name: create_book_nonexistent_author
test_cases.description: Create book with non-existent author_id returns 404

test_cases.name: get_book_success
test_cases.description: Get existing book returns 200 with full details

test_cases.name: get_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Get soft-deleted book returns 410 Gone

test_cases.name: soft_delete_book_success
test_cases.description: Delete book performs soft delete and returns 204

test_cases.name: restore_soft_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore soft-deleted book returns 200

test_cases.name: restore_non_deleted_book
test_cases.description: Restore non-deleted book returns 400 Bad Request

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_old_book
test_cases.description: Apply discount to book published > 1 year ago returns 200

test_cases.name: apply_discount_to_new_book
test_cases.description: Apply discount to book published < 1 year ago returns 400

test_cases.name: apply_discount_invalid_percent
test_cases.description: Apply discount with percent > 50 returns 422

test_cases.name: update_stock_increase
test_cases.description: Increase book stock with positive quantity returns 200

test_cases.name: update_stock_insufficient
test_cases.description: Decrease stock below zero returns 400 Bad Request

test_cases.name: upload_cover_success
test_cases.description: Upload valid JPEG cover returns 200

test_cases.name: upload_cover_invalid_type
test_cases.description: Upload non-image file returns 415 Unsupported Media Type

test_cases.name: upload_cover_too_large
test_cases.description: Upload cover > 2MB returns 413 Content Too Large
